commands.review_summary:
The PR changes provider-flow plus image/video provider-registry tests from static `vi.spyOn` imports to hoisted `vi.mock` mocks and reloads provider-flow modules after `vi.resetModules()`.

Reproducibility: no. there is not a high-confidence live reproduction here. Source inspection shows the static spy plus `vi.resetModules()` and dynamic-import pattern in the registry tests, but there is no failing-before or passing-after shard output and this read-only review did not run Vitest.
commands.review_followup: The protected label and missing external real behavior proof require maintainer/contributor follow-up rather than an automated repair PR.
